batch_summary: In Monica's apartment, Monica tries to bond with her baby nephew, Ben, but he bursts into tears whenever she holds him. Ross and Chandler successfully soothe the baby just by holding him, but the moment Ben is handed back to Monica, he starts crying again. This repetitive rejection leaves Monica feeling distressed and insecure, leading her to lament that she is both unemployed and hated by her nephew, while Joey finds the situation amusing and Ross offers a clumsy attempt at comfort.
cumulative_summary: In Monica's apartment, a lighthearted yet stressful situation unfolds when Monica tries to bond with her baby nephew, Ben. Every time Monica holds the baby, he bursts into loud crying. Ross attempts to soothe Ben with jingling keys, which prompts a sarcastic remark from Joey, but the crying only stops when Ross takes the baby into his own arms. To test if the baby specifically dislikes Monica, Chandler takes a turn holding Ben, and the baby instantly quiets down, only to scream again the moment he is returned to Monica. This comical but disheartening cycle leaves Monica feeling deeply insecure, leading her to dramatically declare that she is unemployed and her nephew hates her. While Joey finds the situation amusing, Ross tries to reassure her in his own awkward way.

batch_summary: After Chandler clumsily tries to comfort Monica about her future parenting worries by pointing out she doesn't have a boyfriend, the group gathers for pie. Ross suddenly has an allergic reaction to the kiwi in Monica's pie. As his tongue begins to swell and his speech slurs, Monica insists they go to the hospital for a shot. Terrified of needles, Ross immediately tries to downplay his symptoms to avoid going.
